privileged_info_summary: The DNC file '/home/ga/Documents/VicidialData/dnc_optout_requests.txt' is generated dynamically during task setup by extracting 10 real US Senator office phone numbers from a provided dataset, so the expected DNC list increase is exactly 10. The Vicidial administration panel credentials in this environment are user 6666 and password andromeda.
